svg.title: Shell workflow flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the shell execution lifecycle from Start through Initialize, Display Directory, Read Input, Parse Command, Built-in check, Pipe check, Execute, Wait, and back to Repeat Loop.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a shell first starts?')
sendPrompt('What does initializing a shell involve?')
sendPrompt('How does the shell display the current directory in the prompt?')
sendPrompt('How does a shell read user input?')
sendPrompt('How does a shell parse a command?')
sendPrompt('Give examples of shell built-in commands like cd, echo, export')
sendPrompt('How does a shell handle piped commands?')
sendPrompt('How does a shell execute a simple command using fork and exec?')
sendPrompt('What does wait() do in a shell process?')
sendPrompt('How does the shell event loop work?')
